_readme: Import this file into n8n via Settings > Import from file. Replace all YOUR_* placeholders with your actual credentials and IDs. See README.md for full setup instructions.
_workflow: RAG Knowledge Base Agent — n8n + Google Drive + OpenAI Embeddings + Pinecone + GPT-4.1-mini

_pipelines.ingestion: Schedule/Manual Trigger > Google Drive list > Sheets deduplication > Loop > Download PDF > Text Split > Embed > Pinecone store (namespace per file)
_pipelines.query: Chat Trigger > AI Agent > Vector Store Tool > Pinecone retrieve top-10 > GPT-4.1-mini grounded answer

_placeholders.YOUR_GOOGLE_DRIVE_CREDENTIAL_ID: n8n Google Drive OAuth2 credential ID
_placeholders.YOUR_GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID: Google Drive folder ID containing your PDFs
_placeholders.YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for tracking indexed files
